description: arXiv:2511.16107v4 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Visual in-context learning (VICL) solves visual tasks by conditioning on a few input-output demonstrations without any model training. Recent advances in large vision-language models (VLMs) have shown promising VICL capability when the demonstration pair and the query belong to the same vision task, but real use cases often provide misma...
author: Shao-Jun Xia, Huixin Zhang, Zhengzhong Tu
